---
id: handle-webhook
title: "Polar webhook receiver"
description: "Receives and processes Polar webhook events (subscription created/updated/cancelled, order created). Verifies the webhook signature before processing. Returns 200 for success or known-skip, 400 for malformed payloads, 503 for transient failures"
sidebar_label: "Polar webhook receiver"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/rushomon-url-shortener-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Polar webhook receiver"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/billing/webhook"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Receives and processes Polar webhook events (subscription created/updated/cancelled, order created). Verifies the webhook signature before processing. Returns 200 for success or known-skip, 400 for malformed payloads, 503 for transient failures

<ParamsDetails>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  {...require("./handle-webhook.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./handle-webhook.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
